RK PID Annotator

RK PID Annotator is a Windows Excel add-in for annotating P&ID PDF documents from the currently open Excel workbook.

Basic Workflow

  1. Open the workbook that contains your component or tag list.
  2. Select the worksheet with the tag data.
  3. Click PID Annotator -> Annotate PDFs.
  4. Confirm the header row and choose the tag column.
  5. Select one or more note columns, such as description, location, comments, or service.
  6. Choose the PDF file and output path.
  7. Click Annotate.

Preview Tags

Use Preview Tags before annotating to confirm that the add-in is reading the expected worksheet data.

PDF Output

The add-in searches the PDF text for exact tag values from the selected Excel column. Matching words are highlighted, and a PDF note annotation is added with the selected Excel data.

Troubleshooting

  • If no tags are found, confirm that the selected PDF contains selectable text rather than only scanned images.
  • If the wrong data appears, confirm the active worksheet and header row before running the annotation.
  • If Excel blocks the add-in, right-click the downloaded .xll, open Properties, and choose Unblock if Windows shows that option.

About

Click PID Annotator -> About to see version, author, contact, and GitHub repository information.
